历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 3747 → 3951 → 4345 → 5057 → 5223, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1276 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 5223 in 2025. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category/Science from 2021 to 2025 were 292 → 283 → 269 → 253 → 261 respectively. In 2026, the planned enrollment for Physics Category is 254, and for Medical Category (Physics Category students) is 57, totaling 311, an increase of about 19.2% compared to 261 in 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; Soft Science main ranking: 14th in 2021 → 11th in 2022 → 12th in 2023 → 15th in 2024 → 15th in 2025 → 16th in 2026, consistently among the top 16 nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving 51 negative incidents such as teacher ethics and academic misconduct, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with general short video exposure. Abnormal signals in admission scores appeared in 2022–2023. Disciplines include Stomatology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Mathematics A, Pharmacy A, Computer Science and Technology A-, and 19 other A- and above disciplines, with strong medical and humanities strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, matching Sichuan University's strengths. Medical majors like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine have stable and slightly hot popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is 299,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 203,320 based on historical proportions, a slight decrease of about 1.9% from 207,171 in 2025. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, adjacent to Guizhou, with strong regional preference. In 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5% (Physics Category), at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+19.2%) easing competition, negative reputation suppressing enthusiasm, and a slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in this province, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5773, with a range of 5273–6273.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在贵州省医学类单独招生批次中，2021年至2025年最低录取位次分别为3730、3902、4345、8128、4866。2024年位次大幅下滑至8128（扩招至56人），2025年迅速回升 至4866（计划缩减至49人）。2026年医学类总计划为57人，较2025年的49人扩招约16.3%，扩招幅度显著。按供需弹性模型计算，扩招将导致位次数字增大（竞争相对缓和），基 准位次约为5343名。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其华西医学中心历史悠久、声誉卓著，口腔医学、临床医学等 学科在全国处于顶尖水平，对贵州考生具有极强的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续走高，四川大学作为西南地区医学教育的标杆，其医学类专业在贵州省的竞争尤为激烈。2026年医学类计划扩招至57人，为近六年 最高，一定程度上缓解了竞争压力，但口腔、临床等核心专业仍保持高门槛。贵州省医学类招生规模整体有限，四川大学医学类计划占比较高，供需关系总体偏紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年四川大学在贵州省医学类最低录取位次约为5373名，较2025年的4866名有所下降（位次数字增大，更易进入）。扩招带来的位次 下行压力与医学持续高热度的上行拉力相互抵消，预计位次在5104至5642名之间波动。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In the separate medical admission batch of Sichuan University in Guizhou Province, the minimum admission rankings from 2021 to 2025 were 3730, 3902, 4345, 8128, and 4866 respectively. In 2024, the ranking dropped sharply to 8128 (with enrollment expanded to 56 students), and in 2025 it quickly rebounded to 4866 (with the plan reduced to 49 students). In 2026, the total medical plan is 57 students, an increase of about 16.3% compared to 49 students in 2025, a significant expansion. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the expansion will cause the ranking number to increase (competition relatively eases), with a baseline ranking of approximately 5343.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its West China Medical Center has a long history and outstanding reputation, with disciplines such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine at the top level nationwide, exerting a strong appeal to Guizhou candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors across the country has continued to rise. As a benchmark for medical education in Southwest China, Sichuan University's medical majors are particularly competitive in Guizhou Province. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan expands to 57 students, the highest in the past six years, which alleviates competition pressure to some extent, but core majors such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine still maintain high thresholds. The overall scale of medical enrollment in Guizhou Province is limited, and Sichuan University's medical plan accounts for a relatively high proportion, with supply and demand generally tight.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical category in Guizhou Province in 2026 will be approximately 5373, a decrease compared to 4866 in 2025 (ranking number increases, easier to enter). The downward pressure on rankings due to expansion and the upward pull from sustained high popularity of medicine offset each other, with the ranking expected to fluctuate between 5104 and 5642.
